name: Oven Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Mushroom stems and pieces, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except cheese and the second 1 cup of croutons in a 1 1/2-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole.
2. Sprinkle with cheese and the 1 cup of croutons or crushed potato chips.
3. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven 6 to 8 minutes or until bubbly.
